alex has been reading a series of novels that challenge his traditional views on love and relationships. the first novel, *love in the dark*, took him 4 days to finish, and it contained 120 pages. the second novel, *the broken heart*, was longer, with 180 pages, and it took him 6 days to complete. the third novel, *the silence between us*, was the longest, with 240 pages, and it took him 8 days to finish. each novel was read at a consistent pace, with the same number of pages per day for each. the total number of pages read per day across all three novels is what we need to calculate.

alex read 120 pages in 4 days, which means he read 30 pages per day on average. the second novel had 180 pages and took 6 days, so he read 30 pages per day as well. the third novel had 240 pages and took 8 days, which means he read 30 pages per day. the average number of pages read per day across all three novels is 30 pages per day.

the total number of pages read per day is the sum of pages read per day for each novel divided by the number of novels. the total pages read per day for the first novel is 30, for the second is 30, and for the third is 30. the total is 30 + 30 + 30 = 90 pages per day. this is the average number of pages alex read per day across all three novels.
